name: two-pass reconciler does not promote a pattern when the subagent classifies it as same as an existing rule
command: printf '{"pattern_id":"p1","matched_rule_id":"r-existing","classification":"same"}\n' > decision.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/apply-classification.sh" --decision decision.json --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'action=skip-promotion' out.txt && grep -q 'matched_rule_id=r-existing' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
